corpus.title: Venezuela : le bilan du double séisme s’alourdit à 3 811 morts
corpus.signal_text:
Venezuela : le bilan du double séisme s’alourdit à 3 811 morts

Le bilan du double séisme du 24 juin au Venezuela a été révisé à la hausse et s'élève désormais à 3.811 morts, a annoncé mercredi le président de l'Assemblée nationale Jorge Rodriguez lors d'une intervention télévisée.

corpus.title: Venezuela quake death toll rises to nearly 3,000
corpus.signal_text:
Venezuela quake death toll rises to nearly 3,000

Eleven days after the devastating twin earthquakes, rescue teams are starting to wrap up searches for survivors while families still try to recover bodies of loved ones from the rubble. Leer más

corpus.title: Venezuela quake death toll rises to 3,535, over 16,700 injured
corpus.signal_text:
Venezuela quake death toll rises to 3,535, over 16,700 injured

The death toll from the twin earthquakes that struck Venezuela on June 24 has risen to 3,535, with 16,740 people injured, according to an update from National Assembly President Jorge Rodriguez on Monday.

corpus.title: Mortes em terremotos na Venezuela vão a 3.685, diz regime
corpus.signal_text:
Mortes em terremotos na Venezuela vão a 3.685, diz regime

O número de mortos após os terremotos gêmeos do último dia 24 na Venezuela subiu a 3.685, divulgou nesta terça-feira (7) o regime venezuelano. O número de feridos está em 17 mil. Não há informações oficiais sobre desaparecidos, com estimativas de diferentes órgãos colocando o possível número entre 10 mil e 50 mil. Leia mais (07/07/2026 - 18h49)

corpus.title: La reconstrucción: a dos semanas del doblete sísmico, Venezuela busca opciones para resurgir
corpus.signal_text:
La reconstrucción: a dos semanas del doblete sísmico, Venezuela busca opciones para resurgir

El Gobierno busca recursos para afrontar la reconstrucción de las zonas afectadas después de los dos terremotos ocurridos hace dos semanas. Existe la posibilidad real de comprar casas prefabricadas para aliviar la crisis ocupacional que generó el doblete sísmico. Por otro lado, la administración de Delcy Rodríguez hace esfuerzos para dinamizar la inversión en el área de hidrocarburos, y académicos le piden a Estados Unidos y al FMI alivios en las sanciones a la nación.

corpus.title: Séismes au Venezuela : le bilan monte à 3 811 morts, la présidente demande au roi d’Angleterre le déblocage de l’or du pays
corpus.signal_text:
Séismes au Venezuela : le bilan monte à 3 811 morts, la présidente demande au roi d’Angleterre le déblocage de l’or du pays

Alors que les besoins humanitaires restent considérables, Caracas poursuit ses démarches pour obtenir la levée des restrictions sur ses avoirs gelés à l’étranger. Les Nations unies évaluent les pertes provoquées par les séismes à 6,7 milliards de dollars.

corpus.title: Quake-hit Venezuela's push for a swift debt deal raises fears of future crisis
corpus.signal_text:
Quake-hit Venezuela's push for a swift debt deal raises fears of future crisis

LONDON, July 8 - Venezuela is seeking to push through in record time one of the most complex debt restructurings ever attempted, with claims approaching $200 billion, even as the country's recovery is set back by devastating earthquakes killing thousands of people.

corpus.title: Death toll from Venezuela quakes rises to 3,811 as government seeks frozen funds
corpus.signal_text:
Death toll from Venezuela quakes rises to 3,811 as government seeks frozen funds

CARACAS, July 8 - The death toll from Venezuela's twin earthquakes has risen to 3,811, according to figures released by National Assembly President Jorge Rodriguez on Wednesday.

corpus.title: Death toll from earthquake in Venezuela up to 3,811
corpus.signal_text:
Death toll from earthquake in Venezuela up to 3,811

According to President of the National Assembly of the Bolivarian Republic Jorge Rodríguez, 16,740 people were injured
